title: PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SERVICES - 211info
text: THE DALLES CLINIC PREGNANCY AND POSTPARTUM SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patients one-on-one support from a Certified Community Health Worker and Registered Nurse throughout their pregnancy. Prenatal care and postpartum services, including pregnancy education, breastfeeding and breast pump support/teaching. Mental health support and family planning services offered. 1040 Webber Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 8am-3pm Email (541) 296-4610 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 296-4610 FAX (541) 639-4142 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and private insurance. Offers sliding scale discount for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Hood River and Wasco Counties Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Postpartum Care Prenatal Care Prenatal Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - LGBTQ2+ HEALTH CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - INSURANCE ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE MUTUAL SUPPORT - SALUD DIABETES MANAGEMENT PROGRAM OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MEDICAL SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE DALLES CLINIC
